title: Runaway Raccoon
overview: Fleeing persecution as a beastman, Michiru journeys to Anima-City, where she meets wolf Shirou amidst the celebrations for the city's 10th anniversary.

title: Rabbit Town
overview: Michiru can't prove she was human without her stolen student ID, so she heads to Rabbit Town to retrieve it. Shirou meets with the mayor.

title: Rhino Melancholy
overview: The mayor asks Shirou to investigate a series of bombings. Michiru talks her way into joining him, with the goal of protecting a medical center.

title: Dolphin Daydream
overview: Using an illegal SIM card, Michiru befriends influencer Nina, who's fascinated by humans. The two of them sneak out to a party in the human world.

title: Greedy Bears
overview: Though she prefers basketball, Michiru reluctantly joins a hard-luck baseball team whose hangdog coach is on the sports betting take.

title: Fox Waltz
overview: The Church of the Silver Wolf arrives in Anima-City. Michiru is shocked to learn that their leader is her friend Nazuna, who was once human like her.

title: Easy Albatross
overview: Michiru meets albatross beastman Pingua when he crash lands in her house. Shirou has an encounter with Alan Sylvasta in the mayor's office.

title: The Mole Rat Speaks
overview: After a visit from Boris, Yaba morphs into an uncontrollable beast form. The mayor tells Michiru the true history of the silver wolf.

title: Human Scapegoat
overview: While Shirou investigates what happened to Yaba, Michiru sneaks into the Sylvasta medical center after seeing Nazuna kidnapped once again.

title: Rabid Wolf
overview: Shirou and Michiru set out to subdue another monstrous beastman. After Sylvasta's machines interfere, Alan tells them about Nirvasyl Syndrome.

title: A Beastly Feast
overview: Nazuna decides to reveal she's human during her concert. While the mayor escapes detention in Japan, Shirou and Flip put their own plans into action.

title: Anima-City
overview: The mayor proves that a serum based on Michiru's blood cures Nirvasyl Syndrome, but Alan moves forward with his plan to "solve" the beastman problem.
